Sandalwood, costus, madder, yellow orpiment, red arsenic,
PriyaAgu, Vaca (orris root), Dantl, Guricha, MoruAga (or anti-
mony ?), turmeric, Suvarnapuspl, Agnimantha (Prernua Spinosa),
Girikarnika (Clitoria), Purnako^a, Katurohinl, Trayamana,
Sahadevi, Nagapuspa, Kapikacchu (Cowitch), Satavarl and
Somarajl—all these sacrificial materials should be put into full
pots, and the same collected materials offered properly to the Deities
as Bali (food) along with eatables of various kinds, consisting mostly
